title: Verify E2E tests pass with dev server running
body: The test file tests/e2e/start-redesign.e2e.spec.ts was created but could not be run because the dev server is not running. When the dev server is available, run `pnpm test:e2e` to verify all 10 test cases pass.
rationale: The E2E tests cover all major sections of the new page (nav, hero, comparison, stats, features, tabs, simulation, CTA, onboarding overlay) and verify the CTA buttons stay on /start (not navigate to /study). These need an actual browser environment to validate.

title: Consider extracting common gradient values to design tokens
body: The new page uses hardcoded hex gradients like 'linear-gradient(135deg, #0ea5e9, #a855f7)' repeatedly. The existing design system uses CSS variables. Consider adding these gradients as reusable design tokens if this pattern is used elsewhere.
rationale: The primary-to-accent gradient appears in multiple places (nav buttons, feature icons, tab active state, stats section, etc.). A CSS variable would make it consistent and easier to change in one place.
